meta.question: Which of the organization's models deal with university admissions? (Organization ID: 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa)
meta.finalAnswer:
The organization (ID: 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa) has **1 model dealing with university admissions**:

**"Choreographiedagramm Hochschulbewerbung"** (created on 2019-05-16)

This German model name translates to "Choreography Diagram University Application" — directly relating to the university admissions process.

The organization has 15 models in total, but this is the only one specifically about university admissions.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?model ?modelName ?created WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?modelName .
  OPTIONAL { ?model tai:modelCreated ?created . }
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?org tai:organizationId "2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa" .
}
ORDER BY ?modelName
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found 15 models in the organization. One model clearly deals with university admissions based on its name: "Choreographiedagramm Hochschulbewerbung" (Hochschulbewerbung = university application/admission in German). This is the only model in this organization related to university admissions.
